remarks.zh: 窗户加工的多行输出示例。请根据需要调整偏移量。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output pelbagai baris untuk fabrikasi tingkap. Laraskan offset mengikut keperluan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh output multi-garis untuk fabrikasi jendela. Sesuaikan offset sesuai kebutuhan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างของผลลัพธ์แบบหลายบรรทัดสำหรับการผลิตหน้าต่าง ปรับออฟเซตตามต้องการ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về kết quả nhiều dòng cho gia công cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh khoảng cách theo nhu cầu. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line na output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပြွန်ပေါ် ထွင်းရိုက်ခန်း၊ ချိန်ရန် အမှားအားဖြင့်၊ ကော်ဖျူစင်းတာတိုးရန်၊ ယာကျခံရန် ။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ឧទាហរណ៍នៃលទ្ធផលជាបន្ទាត់ច្រើនសម្រាប់ការផលិតបង្អួច។ សូមកែសំរួលបំបែកតាមដែលចាំបាច់។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງຜົນລັບຫຼາຍດຽວ ສຳລັບຟັດຄອມປ່ອນ. ປັບແກ້ໄນສ່ວນໜຶ່ງເພື່ອຄວາມີເປີນབសប់. (AI translate responsible.)inputs!__) please endok _endforeachek! 춣(translateSecure}
